home.hero_subtitle: The Formula Student team of FCT NOVA
home.about_text: We are the Formula Student team of NOVA School of Science and Technology. A group of students passionate about engineering and motorsport, united by the challenge of designing, building and competing with electric single-seaters.

about.title: About Us
about.who_text: Nova Formula Student is a student team from FCT NOVA that designs, builds and competes with cars in Formula Student competitions. Founded with the mission of providing hands-on engineering experience, the team brings together students from various fields such as mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, computer science and management.
about.how_text: Formula Student is the world's largest engineering competition for university students. Teams design and build a race car and are evaluated in static and dynamic events.
about.business_plan_desc: Presentation of the business plan for the mass production of the developed prototype.
about.cost_manufacturing_desc: Detailed analysis of production costs and manufacturing processes used.
about.engineering_design_desc: Evaluation of the design and engineering solutions implemented in the car.
about.skidpad_desc: Lateral grip test on a figure-eight circuit.
about.autocross_desc: Fast lap on a technical circuit to assess maneuverability.
about.endurance_desc: 22 km endurance race to test reliability and performance.
about.efficiency_desc: Evaluation of energy consumption during the endurance event.

partners.title: Partners
partners.brand_visibility_desc: Your brand present at international competitions and across all team materials.
partners.media_exposure_desc: Coverage on social media, events and team communications.
partners.networking_desc: Direct access to talented young engineers and future professionals.
partners.innovation_desc: Collaboration on advanced engineering and cutting-edge technology projects.
partners.education_desc: Contributing to the practical training of future engineers.
